title: Methods and apparatus for csi-rs port subset indication
abstract: Certain aspects of the present disclosure relate to communication systems, and more particularly, to a partial channel state information reference signal (CSI-RS) port indication. A method by a base station (BS) includes configuring a user equipment (UE) with a CSI-RS resource, of one or more CSI-RS resources associated with a CSI report. The CSI-RS includes a set of CSI-RS ports. The BS provides a first indication to the UE of a subset of groups of the CSI-RS ports to be used by the UE for channel measurements and/or a second indication to the UE of a subset of groups of the CSI-RS to be used by the UE for interference measurements. Based on the indication, the UE performs channel measurements and/or interference measurements using the indicated subset of CSI-RS ports.
claims: Claims ( 30 ) AĂ‚Â methodĂ‚Â forĂ‚Â wirelessĂ‚Â communicationsĂ‚Â byĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â userĂ‚Â equipmentĂ‚Â (UE)Ă‚Â ,Ă‚Â comprising: receivingĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â channelĂ‚Â stateĂ‚Â informationĂ‚Â referenceĂ‚Â signalĂ‚Â (CSI-RS)Ă‚Â resourceĂ‚Â configuration,Ă‚Â ofĂ‚Â oneĂ‚Â orĂ‚Â moreĂ‚Â CSI-RSĂ‚Â resourcesĂ‚Â associatedĂ‚Â withĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â CSIĂ‚Â report,Ă‚Â fromĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â baseĂ‚Â stationĂ‚Â (BS)Ă‚Â ,Ă‚Â whereinĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â CSI-RSĂ‚Â resourceĂ‚Â comprisesĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â setĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â CSI-RSĂ‚Â ports; receivingĂ‚Â atĂ‚Â leastĂ‚Â oneĂ‚Â of:Ă‚Â aĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â indicationĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â subsetĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â groupsĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â configuredĂ‚Â setĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â CSI-RSĂ‚Â portsĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â beĂ‚Â usedĂ‚Â byĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â UEĂ‚Â forĂ‚Â channelĂ‚Â measurementsĂ‚Â orĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â indicationĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â subsetĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â groupsĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â configuredĂ‚Â setĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â CSI-RSĂ‚Â portsĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â beĂ‚Â usedĂ‚Â byĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â UEĂ‚Â forĂ‚Â interferenceĂ‚Â measurements;Ă‚Â and performingĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â channelĂ‚Â measurementsĂ‚Â orĂ‚Â interferenceĂ‚Â measurementsĂ‚Â usingĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â indicatedĂ‚Â subsetĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â groupsĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â CSI-RSĂ‚Â ports.
